videos.headline: NC State's blocked punt leads the Wolfpack to victory
videos.description: NC State's Pharoah McKever blocks Notre Dame's punt, and the ball is then picked up by Dexter Wright and returned for a touchdown. This would be the only touchdown scored in NC State's victory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (NC State's blocked punt leads the Wolfpack to victory) 2016/10/08

videos.headline: NC State edges Notre Dame in the rain
videos.description: Due to heavy rain, North Carolina State scores the lone touchdown of the game off a blocked punt early in the fourth quarter en route to a 10-3 victory against Notre Dame.

videos.headline: Dreadful weather mars first half of Notre Dame-NC State game
videos.description: Due to powerful rain and high winds from Hurricane Matthew, fans and players from Notre Dame and NC State are making the most of the conditions.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Dreadful weather mars first half of Notre Dame-NC State game) 2016/10/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bad 4th-down snap effectively ends Irish's chances
videos.description: DeShone Kizer was not ready for the snap on 4th down deep in NC State territory. Kizer recovered the ball but made an illegal throw to an ineligible receiver with the Irish trailing 10-3.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bad fourth down snap effectively ends Irish's chances) 2016/10/08
